channel.title: Safety Instrumented System on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Safety Instrumented System on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA SecOT+ (SOT-001): OT Systems and Safety Foundations
item.category: "CompTIA SecOT+ Course" , "OT Systems" , "Safety Foundations" , "Industrial Control Systems" , "SCADA" , "PLC" , "Industrial Protocols" , "Operational Technology" , "SOT-001" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master OT systems and safety foundations for the CompTIA SecOT+ SOT-001 exam. Learn safety procedures, OT components like PLCs and HMIs, control systems such as SCADA and DCS, control logic, and industrial protocols including Modbus and DNP3.

item.title: CompTIA SecOT+ Course: Complete Study Guide for the SOT-001 Exam
item.category: "CompTIA SecOT+ Course" , "SOT-001 Certification" , "OT Security" , "Operational Technology" , "Industrial Control Systems" , "SCADA Security" , "ICS Security" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Critical Infrastructure" , "OT Cybersecurity"
item.description: A comprehensive CompTIA SecOT+ (SOT-001) study course covering OT systems and safety foundations, OT risk management, OT threat intelligence, OT cybersecurity architecture, OT security operations, and OT incident management for control engineers and OT cybersecurity professionals.
